name: Is Lunch Free Yet? Overcoming the Cold-Start Problem in Supervised Content Scoring using Zero-Shot LLM-Generated Training Data
venue: Proceedings of the 20th Workshop on Innovative Use of NLP for Building Educational Applications
summary: BEA 2025 paper evaluating zero-shot LLM-generated short-answer training data for supervised content scoring on the Student Response Analysis dataset, including generated target labels and manual relabeling of generated answers.

access_attempts.notes: ACL Anthology PDF is available and was used for label-noise and relabeling extraction.
